nodes.label: Tests for Tencent TokenHub provider support (Hy3 Preview).
Verify tencent-tokenhub is registered correctly in the PROVIDER_REGISTRY.
Setting TOKENHUB_API_KEY should auto-detect the provider.
Test credential resolution for the tencent-tokenhub provider.
OpenRouter users should NOT see tencent-tokenhub as configured.
Tencent TokenHub appears in the interactive model picker.
tencent/hy3-preview:free and tencent/hy3-preview should appear in OpenRouter and
tencent/hy3-preview (paid, no :free suffix) should also be in OpenRouter list.
Model name normalization — Tencent TokenHub is a direct provider     not in _MAT
hy3-preview should remain unchanged when targeting tencent-tokenhub.
tencent/hy3-preview is not stripped since tencent-tokenhub is not in         _MA
tencent-tokenhub does NOT need prefix stripping — it only has         one model
tencent-tokenhub does not require lowercase normalization.
None, empty, and whitespace-only inputs return empty string.
Test provider_label() from models.py for tencent-tokenhub.
Test URL → provider inference for Tencent TokenHub endpoints.
hy3-preview has a context-length entry registered.      Asserting the relationsh
Test Tencent TokenHub in the unified providers module.
Verify mangaba doctor recognizes Tencent TokenHub env vars.
Verify the agent can be constructed with tencent-tokenhub provider without error
Importing run_agent with tencent-tokenhub should not raise.
tencent-tokenhub must appear in the elif tuple in _model_flow dispatch         s
Verify tencent/hy3-preview:free and tencent/hy3-preview are present in the websi
Verify tencent-tokenhub and its aliases are recognized as valid     provider nam
